history.en: Developed in the Ariège region of southern France in the early 20th century by crossing local briquet hounds with Grand Bleu de Gascogne and Grand Gascon-Saintongeois to create a versatile and durable pack hound for hunting hare
history.zh: 20世纪初在法国南部的阿列日地区培育而成，通过将当地的布里凯猎犬与大蓝加斯科涅犬和大加斯科涅-圣东日犬杂交，创造出一种多功能且耐用的群猎犬，用于猎兔。

overview.en: The Ariégeois is a medium-sized hound breed originating from the Ariège region of southern France. Bred for hunting hare in packs, this dog is known for its gentle, calm, and affectionate temperament. Despite its hunting heritage, it is remarkably friendly and loyal, making it an excellent family companion. Ariégeois dogs are intelligent and independent, yet they form strong bonds with their owners. They have a melodious bark and a keen sense of smell, typical of scent hounds. Their personality is balanced—neither overly energetic nor lazy—making them adaptable to various lifestyles. They are generally good with children and other dogs, though their hunting instincts may be triggered by small animals. Overall, the Ariégeois is a devoted, easygoing breed that thrives on companionship and moderate activity.
overview.zh: 阿列日犬是一种中型猎犬，原产于法国南部的阿列日地区。该犬种最初被培育用于群体狩猎野兔，以其温和、冷静且深情的性格而闻名。尽管拥有狩猎传统，它们却异常友善且忠诚，是出色的家庭伴侣。阿列日犬聪明、独立，但与主人建立深厚的情感纽带。它们的吠声悦耳，嗅觉敏锐，是典型的嗅觉猎犬。性格平衡——既不过度活跃也不懒惰——使其能适应多种生活方式。它们通常对儿童和其他犬类友好，但狩猎本能可能对小动物产生反应。总体而言，阿列日犬是一种忠诚、随和的犬种，喜欢陪伴和适度的活动。

care.en: Daily care for the Ariégeois is straightforward. Their short, dense coat requires minimal grooming—weekly brushing with a rubber curry comb or hound glove to remove loose hair and keep the coat shiny. Bathing is only needed occasionally. Exercise is crucial: they need at least 45–60 minutes of daily activity, including walks, runs, or play sessions in a secure area. As a scent hound, they enjoy following trails, so supervised off-leash time in a fenced yard is ideal. Regular vet visits are essential for vaccinations, parasite control, and dental health. Their floppy ears should be checked weekly for dirt or infection. Nail trimming every few weeks and occasional teeth brushing complete the routine. Ariégeois dogs are generally healthy, but responsible care ensures longevity.
care.zh: 阿列日犬的日常护理很简单。它们短而密的被毛需要最少的梳理——每周用橡胶梳或猎犬手套刷一次，去除死毛并保持毛发光泽。偶尔洗澡即可。运动至关重要：每天至少需要45–60分钟的活动，包括散步、跑步或在安全区域玩耍。作为嗅觉猎犬，它们喜欢追踪气味，因此在围栏庭院中监督下的自由活动是理想选择。定期兽医检查对疫苗接种、寄生虫控制和牙齿健康必不可少。它们的垂耳应每周检查一次，以防污垢或感染。每隔几周修剪指甲，并偶尔刷牙，组成完整的护理流程。阿列日犬通常健康，但负责任的护理能延长其寿命。

training.en: Training an Ariégeois requires patience and consistency due to their independent hound nature. They are intelligent but can be stubborn, so positive reinforcement methods—like treats, praise, and play—work best. Start training early, focusing on basic commands and leash manners. Because they are pack-oriented, they respond well to calm, confident leadership. Scent-based games and tracking exercises tap into their natural abilities and keep them engaged. Socialization from puppyhood is vital to ensure they are comfortable with people, other animals, and new environments. Avoid harsh corrections, as they can become anxious or resistant. Short, varied training sessions (10–15 minutes) are more effective than long ones. Their baying instinct can be managed with a 'quiet' command. Overall, a structured yet gentle approach yields a well-behaved companion.
training.zh: 训练阿列日犬需要耐心和一致性，因为它们有独立的猎犬天性。它们聪明但可能固执，因此正面强化方法——如零食、赞美和游戏——效果最佳。尽早开始训练，专注于基本指令和牵引绳礼仪。由于它们具有群体导向，对冷静、自信的领导反应良好。基于气味的游戏和追踪练习能发挥其天生能力并保持其兴趣。幼犬期的社会化至关重要，以确保它们对人、其他动物和新环境感到舒适。避免严厉纠正，否则它们可能变得焦虑或抗拒。短而多样的训练课（10–15分钟）比长时间训练更有效。它们的吠叫本能可通过“安静”指令管理。总体而言，结构化而温和的方法能培养出行为良好的伴侣犬。

diet.en: The Ariégeois thrives on a high-quality, balanced diet suited to its age, size, and activity level. As an active hound, it benefits from protein-rich food (20–25% protein) to support muscle maintenance and energy. Look for commercial dog foods with real meat as the first ingredient, or consult a vet for a home-cooked diet. Adult dogs typically need 2–3 cups of dry food per day, split into two meals. Puppies require more frequent feeding (3–4 times daily) with a growth-formulated diet. Avoid overfeeding, as this breed can gain weight if under-exercised. Treats should be limited and used mainly for training. Fresh water must always be available. Some Ariégeois may have food sensitivities, so monitor for allergies. Omega-3 fatty acids from fish oil can support coat and joint health.
diet.zh: 阿列日犬需要适合其年龄、体型和活动水平的高质量均衡饮食。作为活跃的猎犬，它们受益于富含蛋白质的食物（20–25%蛋白质），以支持肌肉维持和能量。选择以真实肉类为首要成分的商业狗粮，或咨询兽医进行家庭烹饪饮食。成年犬通常每天需要2–3杯干粮，分两餐喂食。幼犬需要更频繁的喂食（每天3–4次），使用生长配方粮。避免过度喂食，因为该品种在运动不足时可能发胖。零食应有限，主要用于训练。必须随时提供新鲜水。一些阿列日犬可能有食物敏感性，因此需监测过敏反应。来自鱼油的Omega-3脂肪酸可支持被毛和关节健康。

livingTips.en: The Ariégeois is adaptable but best suited to a home with a securely fenced yard where it can explore and follow scents. While they can live in an apartment, they need ample daily exercise and mental stimulation to prevent boredom. Their moderate size and calm indoor demeanor make them manageable in smaller spaces if their needs are met. They are generally excellent with children, being gentle and patient, but supervision is recommended with very young kids. They get along well with other dogs, especially if raised together, but their hunting instinct may make them chase small pets like cats or rabbits. Early socialization can mitigate this. Ariégeois dogs are not excessive barkers but will vocalize when excited. They prefer company and may develop separation anxiety if left alone for long periods. A loving, active household is ideal.
livingTips.zh: 阿列日犬适应性强，但最适合拥有安全围栏庭院的家庭，以便它们探索和追踪气味。虽然它们可以住在公寓中，但需要充足每日运动和智力刺激以防无聊。其适中的体型和冷静的室内行为使它们在较小空间中也能管理，只要满足其需求。它们通常对孩子极好，温和耐心，但建议在非常年幼的儿童旁边监督。它们与其他犬类相处融洽，尤其是一起长大的情况下，但狩猎本能可能使它们追逐猫或兔子等小宠物。早期社会化可以缓解这一点。阿列日犬不是过度吠叫的犬种，但兴奋时会发声。它们喜欢陪伴，如果长时间独处可能产生分离焦虑。充满爱意、活跃的家庭是理想选择。
